exploration_notes: Found 198 unique JavaScript source files in lib/ that defend against prototype pollution using the following patterns: (1) Null-prototype objects via `{ __proto__: null }` (160 files, the dominant pattern) and `Object.create(null)` (1 file: http2/compat.js); (2) Safe hasOwnProperty checks via `ObjectPrototypeHasOwnProperty` (28 files) and `ObjectHasOwn` (7 files); (3) Safe merge/assign patterns including `ObjectAssign` from primordials (24 files), `SafeMap`/`SafeSet`/`SafeWeakMap`/`SafeArrayIter
